entry.title: IDC HSCEDM14D00004 (P00050) awarded to B.I. INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS ENFORCEMENT MANAGEMENT DIVISION

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CT::IGF INTENSIVE SUPERVISION APPEARANCE PROGRAM (ISAP III) FOR ALTERNATIVES TO DETENTION

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
